raw_consumer_statement: Between XXXX and XXXX of this year, I identified an unauthorized charge of {$1200.00} on my Macy 's account. Despite reporting the issue to Macy 's customer service, the subsequent investigation concluded that there was insufficient evidence to support my claim, holding me responsible for the charge linked to the used name " XXXX XXXX. '' I have changed my name since XXXX  and I have never used the Macy 's card or visited a cigarette store nor smoked. All the transaction from that period of time I do not recognize. I would appreciate your assistance in relaying this summary to Macy 's for their attention and resolution of this dispute.
